选择相似: 从所有未选中的岛屿中，选择所有与当前至少一个已选岛屿形状相似的岛屿。关于相似性检测的更多信息请点击帮助按钮
Select Similar: From all unselected islands, selects all islands which have similar shape to at least one island which is currently selected. For more info regarding similarity detection click the help button

选择相似: 对齐选中的岛屿，使相似的岛屿相互堆叠在一起。关于相似性检测的更多信息请点击帮助按钮
Select Similar: Align the selected islands, so islands which are similar are stacked on the top of each other. For more info regarding similarity detection click the help button

选择相似: 所有大小低于此参数值的相似组将被忽略，其岛屿将重新分配给默认组（{}）。如果未使用此功能（值设为1），默认组将为空
Select Similar: All similarity groups of size lower than the value of this parameter will be ignored and their islands will be reassigned to the default group ({}). If the functionality is not used (value set to 1), the default group will be empty

选择相似: 警告：操作将覆盖现有方案中的所有组。

选择相似: 系统性地将重叠岛屿移动到相邻图块（+X轴方向），使操作完成后没有选中的岛屿相互重叠
Select Similar: Methodically move overlapping islands to adjacent tiles (in the +X axis direction), so that no selected islands are overlapping each other after the operation is done

选择相似: 撤销上次岛屿拆分操作——将所有选中的岛屿移动到拆分前的原始位置。警告：该操作仅处理当前选中的岛屿，因此要将岛屿移回原始位置，请确保运行撤销操作时该岛屿已被选中
Select Similar: Undo the last island split operation - move all selected islands to their original locations before split. WARNING: the operation only process currently selected islands so in order to move an island to its original location, you have to make sure the island is selected when an Undo operation is run
